mapper.sql: id, task_id, trace_id, document_id, access_record_id, config_id, config_name, config_version, file_name, file_type, file_size, storage_path, source_type, source_system, business_no, department_id, category, sub_category, template_type, document_type, priority, status, current_stage, progress, queue_level, queue_name, queue_capacity, queue_position, waiting_minutes, estimated_start_at, manual_accelerated, dispatch_reason, error_code, error_message, failed_stage, retry_count, max_retry, failed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select from extract_task
order by created_at desc

select from extract_task where status = 'QUEUED' order by case manual_accelerated when '1' then 0 else 1 end, case priority when 'HIGH' then 1 when 'MEDIUM' then 2 else 3 end, queue_position asc, created_at asc
mapper.insert: insert into extract_task ( id, task_id, trace_id, document_id, access_record_id, config_id, config_name, config_version, file_name, file_type, file_size, storage_path, source_type, source_system, business_no, department_id, category, sub_category, template_type, document_type, priority, status, current_stage, progress, queue_level, queue_name, queue_capacity, queue_position, waiting_minutes, estimated_start_at, manual_accelerated, dispatch_reason, error_code, error_message, failed_stage, retry_count, max_retry, failed_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{id}, #{taskId}, #{traceId}, #{documentId}, #{accessRecordId}, #{configId}, #{configName}, #{configVersion}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{storagePath}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceSystem}, #{businessNo}, #{departmentId}, #{category}, #{subCategory}, #{templateType}, #{documentType}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{currentStage}, #{progress}, #{queueLevel}, #{queueName}, #{queueCapacity}, #{queuePosition}, #{waitingMinutes}, #{estimatedStartAt}, #{manualAccelerated}, #{dispatchReason}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{failedStage}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetry}, #{failedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update extract_task set priority = #{priority}, queue_level = #{queueLevel}, queue_name = #{queueName}, queue_capacity = #{queueCapacity}, queue_position = #{queuePosition}, waiting_minutes = #{waitingMinutes}, estimated_start_at = #{estimatedStartAt}, manual_accelerated = #{manualAccelerated}, dispatch_reason = #{dispatchReason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where task_id = #{taskId}

update extract_task set status = #{status}, current_stage = #{currentStage}, progress = #{progress}, priority = #{priority}, queue_level = #{queueLevel}, queue_name = #{queueName}, queue_capacity = #{queueCapacity}, queue_position = #{queuePosition}, waiting_minutes = #{waitingMinutes}, estimated_start_at = #{estimatedStartAt}, error_code = null, error_message = null, failed_stage = null, failed_at = null, retry_count = #{retryCount}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where task_id = #{taskId} and status = 'FAILED'

update extract_task set status = #{status}, current_stage = #{currentStage}, progress = #{progress}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, failed_stage = #{failedStage}, failed_at = #{failedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where task_id = #{taskId}
